vlan 1 name DEFAULT-VLAN by port
!
vlan 10 by port
 tagged ethe 1/1/15 ethe 1/1/19 to 1/1/20 ethe 1/1/22 to 1/1/24 ethe 1/2/1 to 1/2/2 ethe 1/3/1 to 1/3/2 ethe 1/3/4

 tagged ethe 1/1/19 to 1/1/20 ethe 1/1/22 to 1/1/24 ethe 1/3/4
